changelog:
Branded launch splash.
• New 1.8s Compose splash screen shows the gold PS-in-photo-frame logo card with a saffron pulse ring and 'NPIC / Photo and signature scanner' wordmark on ivory
• Replaces the plain saffron 'S' vector that flashed for 200ms before Gallery
• Respects the system reduce-motion setting (pulse + scale collapse to static)
